ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  This document from Soma Textiles & Industries Ltd. clarifies that the Record Date for its final dividend is July 17, 2026, directly impacting shareholder eligibility. The company also confirmed that filing a separate Book Closure is no longer required due to the omission of Regulation 42(5) of the SEBI LODR Regulations, showcasing its awareness of and compliance with updated regulatory procedures. There are no apparent red flags; the document serves to address regulatory queries and confirms adherence to current norms.
